creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have modified your patch as follows.

- Fix LIB_DEPENDS for oniguruma
- Fix CFLAGS and LDFLAGS
- Consider NOPORTDATA [1]

Please confirm attached file and use diff(1) and not shar(1) to send
updates to existing ports. [2]

Thanks

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#INSTALL-DOCUMENTATION
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#PORT-UPGRADING

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
